message:
test(formal): waiver governance, trace equivalence, scheduler row validation

tests/lean_ci_verification_profiles.rs:
- Extract known_bead_ids() helper (DRY refactor from inline fold)
- Add ci_profile_waiver_policy_enforces_expiry_and_closure_paths test:
  validates governance_reference_time_utc format, required waiver fields,
  risk class and status value enumerations, governance check IDs
  (expiry.enforced, closure_path.required, closed_requires_closure_bead),
  unique waiver IDs, non-empty owners/reasons, risk class membership,
  RFC3339 timestamp formats, non-empty closure_dependency_paths with
  valid bead references, active waiver expiry enforcement against
  governance reference time, and closed waiver closure_bead + closed_at
  validation

tests/refinement_conformance.rs:
- Add refinement_trace_equivalence_filters_schedule_noise: two traces
  with identical task lifecycle events but different raw interleavings
  must produce the same trace_fingerprint, proving benign schedule noise
  is normalized away by the Track-4 triage mechanism
- Add refinement_trace_equivalence_detects_semantic_mismatch: reordering
  dependent events for the same task (complete before spawn) must produce
  a different fingerprint, proving real semantic divergences are not
  suppressed

tests/runtime_state_refinement_map.rs:
- Extend required operations set with scheduler.three_lane.next_task and
  scope.race_all_loser_drain
- Add validation for expected_trace_signatures (non-empty, unique,
  non-blank) and conformance_test_links (non-empty, non-blank) on
  scheduler/combinator rows

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
